title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Narayana Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Narayana Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Narayana Group family as a Curriculum Developer in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Narayana Group:
Narayana Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Group!
